questions.question:
A resize-capable PVC and Deployment in namespace `pv-resize-lab` are not wired for the intended storage contract.

Fix the workload so that:
- PVC `analytics-data` stays bound to PV `analytics-pv`
- StorageClass `expandable-reports` keeps `allowVolumeExpansion: true`
- PVC `analytics-data` requests `2Gi`
- Deployment `analytics-api` uses claim `analytics-data`
- the volume mounts at `/var/lib/analytics`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running container writes `resize-ready` to `/var/lib/analytics/resize-ready.txt`

Do not delete the PVC or PV, and do not replace the existing StorageClass.

verification.description: The resize-capable PVC contract stays intact and analytics-api uses the intended claim, request size, and mount path
Deployment analytics-api becomes Available after the resize storage repair
The running container writes resize-ready to the mounted analytics path
